title: MTSAntiCheat
description: This anti-cheat ensures fair gameplay by verifying client mods and textures, blocking hacked clients and unauthorized tools, and giving server owners full visibility and control to keep their SMP secure and competitive.
body:
## This version was a beta, soon there will be a upgraded version for servers; that fixes bugs, and adds features. With better security!

## What MTS AntiCheat Does

MTS AntiCheat (Mod-To-Server) is a server-side anti-cheat system that verifies client integrity by receiving mod and texture information directly from connected players. It gives server administrators complete visibility into what mods players are using and allows blocking unauthorized modifications such as hacked clients, minimap mods, world data exploits, and cheat tools.

## Why You Should Download This

- **Complete Client Visibility** - See exactly what mods and textures each player has installed
- **Block Unauthorized Mods** - Prevent hacked clients, exploits, and unfair advantages
- **140+ Configuration Options** - Customize detection and enforcement to your exact needs
- **SMP Focused** - Designed specifically for survival multiplayer environments
- **Maintain Fair Play** - Keep your server cheat-free and competitive

## Important: Client Mod Required

Because MTS AntiCheat operates on a Mod-To-Server system, players must install the client mod for full functionality. You can configure the plugin to require this mod - without it, client mod and texture data cannot be viewed or verified.

## Configuration Options

MTS AntiCheat includes extensive configuration with over 140 options in `config.yml`:
```yaml
# Require client mod for joining
requireClientMod: true

# Block hacked clients
blockHackedClients: true

# Block minimap mods
blockMinimapMods: false

# Logging options
enableLogging: true
logLevel: "INFO"

# And 135+ more customizable options
```

Review and adjust all settings to match your server's security requirements.

## Key Features

**Client Mod Detection**  
Receive real-time information about every mod and texture pack players have installed.

**Flexible Blocking System**  
Block specific mods, categories of mods, or require whitelisted mods only.

**Detailed Logging**  
Track all mod usage, blocked attempts, and suspicious activity for server security.

**Highly Configurable**  
Over 140 options let you customize detection, enforcement, and logging to your exact needs.

**Easy Administration**  
Simple commands to view player mods, manage blocklists, and enforce rules in real-time.

## Installation

1. Download the latest version for your Minecraft version
2. Place the `.jar` file in your server's `plugins` folder
3. Have players install the client mod (required for functionality)
4. Restart your server
5. Configure settings in `plugins/AntiCheatMTS/config.yml`
6. Set up your mod blocklist and whitelist as needed

Default: OP for admin commands

## Supported Detection

The plugin can detect and block:

- Hacked clients (Wurst, LiquidBounce, etc.)
- Minimap mods with unfair advantages
- X-ray and world data exploits
- Auto-clickers and macro tools
- Exploit mods and cheating utilities
- Custom texture packs (optional)

## Development Status

MTS AntiCheat is currently in active testing and development. Core functionality is stable, but new features, improvements, and optimizations are ongoing. Future updates will include additional detection systems, enhanced configuration options, and quality-of-life improvements.

Modded server support coming soon.

## Other Plugins You Might Like

| Plugin | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| [InstaRestock](https://modrinth.com/plugin/instarestock) | Instantly restock villager trades for smoother economy |
| [ItemLimiter](https://modrinth.com/plugin/item_limiter) | Easy-to-use item restriction plugin |

## Support

If you encounter any issues, have feature requests, or want to report bugs, please use the Report button or visit our issue tracker. Your feedback is appreciated during this development phase.

Note: Make sure both the server plugin AND client mod are installed for MTS AntiCheat to function properly.
